<tool-use data-tool-type="unknown" data-tool-name="create_plan">
<details>
<summary>Tool use: **create_plan**</summary>


Parameters:

```json
{
  "name": "模板渲染上提",
  "overview": "在 DigEino 中新增安全默认的通用模板渲染能力，让业务项目只提供模板文件和 view model；同时保持现有 Parse -\u003e Block -\u003e HTML/UIModel 管线不受影响，并为后续 UIModel-first 跨端渲染留下扩展点。",
  "plan": "# DigEino 模板渲染层上提执行方案\n\n## 目标边界\n\n本次升级建议分两期推进。一期先落地“view model -\u003e HTML 片段”的 Go 模板渲染 API，解决业务项目重复维护模板加载、缓存、函数注入、错误分类的问题；二期再扩展 UIModel schema 与跨端渲染器。\n\n现有 [pkg/render](pkg/render) 已经承担“助手文本 -\u003e &#96;[]render.Block&#96; -\u003e HTML / UIModel”的链路，其中 [pkg/render/html/html.go](pkg/render/html/html.go) 负责 Block 到 HTML， [pkg/render/uimodel](pkg/render/uimodel) 负责 Block 到卡片 JSON。新增模板能力不应改变这些接口，避免破坏现有 &#96;Parse -\u003e Markdown -\u003e HTML&#96; 路径。\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\nflowchart LR\n  assistantText[Assistant Text] --\u003e parse[render.Parse]\n  parse --\u003e blocks[Blocks]\n  blocks --\u003e html[render/html]\n  blocks --\u003e blockUIModel[uimodel HybridPayload]\n  viewModel[Business ViewModel] --\u003e templateRender[New Template Renderer]\n  templateRender --\u003e htmlFragment[HTML Fragment]\n  viewModel --\u003e futureUIModel[Future Business UIModel]\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 一期：新增模板渲染包\n\n新增 [pkg/render/template](pkg/render/template) 目录，Go package 建议命名为 &#96;rendertemplate&#96;，避免与标准库 &#96;html/template&#96; 混淆。对外暴露两个核心入口：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nRenderTemplate(templateText string, data any, opts TemplateRenderOptions) (string, error)\nRenderTemplateFromFile(path string, data any, opts TemplateRenderOptions) (string, error)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n&#96;TemplateRenderOptions&#96; 建议包含：\n\n- &#96;Funcs map[string]any&#96;：注入业务安全函数，如格式化数字、百分比、标签映射。\n- &#96;Cache bool&#96;：文件模板默认可开启缓存；inline 模板只有显式 &#96;CacheKey&#96; 时缓存。\n- &#96;CacheKey string&#96;：业务显式缓存键，适合虚拟模板或非文件来源。\n- &#96;BaseDir string&#96;：限制相对模板路径解析范围，防止路径逃逸。\n- &#96;Strict bool&#96;：启用 &#96;missingkey=error&#96;，模板缺字段时返回执行错误。\n\n实现上使用标准库 &#96;html/template&#96;，默认自动 HTML 转义。&#96;RenderTemplateFromFile&#96; 先解析 &#96;BaseDir&#96; 与模板路径，拿到绝对路径后按 &#96;absPath + modTime + size&#96; 作为默认缓存指纹；缓存结构可用 &#96;sync.Map&#96; 或带锁 map，缓存值为已编译的 &#96;*template.Template&#96;。如果 &#96;Cache=false&#96;，每次直接读取并编译。\n\n## 错误模型\n\n新增可区分的错误类型，例如：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\ntype TemplateErrorKind string\nconst (\n    TemplateErrorNotFound TemplateErrorKind = \"not_found\"\n    TemplateErrorPath     TemplateErrorKind = \"path\"\n    TemplateErrorParse    TemplateErrorKind = \"parse\"\n    TemplateErrorExecute  TemplateErrorKind = \"execute\"\n    TemplateErrorFunc     TemplateErrorKind = \"func\"\n)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n对外返回 &#96;*TemplateError&#96;，包含 &#96;Kind&#96;、&#96;TemplateName&#96;、&#96;Path&#96; 和底层 &#96;Err&#96;，并实现 &#96;Unwrap()&#96;。业务侧可用 &#96;errors.As&#96; 判断错误类型，从而做降级或回退到本地渲染。\n\n函数注入需要做最小校验：函数名非空、符合模板函数名要求、值非 nil；具体签名错误交给 &#96;html/template&#96; parse/execute 阶段返回。\n\n## 配置与文档\n\n一期不建议把模板配置直接塞进现有 &#96;render:&#96; YAML。当前 [pkg/render/config.go](pkg/render/config.go) 的 &#96;RenderConfig&#96; 已明确代表 parse 配置与 Block HTML 呈现配置，强行合并会混淆“助手文本渲染”和“业务模板渲染”。\n\n建议先在文档中约定业务项目自行维护：\n\n- &#96;config/templates/*.tmpl&#96;：模板文件。\n- &#96;config/render.yaml&#96; 或独立 CSS：样式策略。\n- 业务 service：DTO -\u003e view model。\n\n更新 [pkg/render/README.md](pkg/render/README.md)，新增“数据模板渲染”章节，明确它与 [pkg/render/html](pkg/render/html) 的区别，并给出 DigStockAgent 类似调用示例。\n\n## 测试计划\n\n新增 [pkg/render/template](pkg/render/template) 单元测试，覆盖：\n\n- 默认转义：&#96;\u003cscript\u003e&#96; 等动态文本被 escape。\n- &#96;Strict=true&#96;：缺字段返回 &#96;TemplateErrorExecute&#96;。\n- &#96;Funcs&#96;：合法函数可用，非法函数返回 &#96;TemplateErrorFunc&#96; 或 parse 错误。\n- 文件加载：相对路径 + &#96;BaseDir&#96; 正常解析。\n- 路径安全：&#96;../&#96; 逃逸 &#96;BaseDir&#96; 时拒绝。\n- 缓存：同一文件缓存命中；文件 &#96;mtime/size&#96; 改变后重新编译。\n- inline 模板：不带 &#96;CacheKey&#96; 不缓存，带 &#96;CacheKey&#96; 可缓存。\n\n执行验证建议跑：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\ngo test ./pkg/render/...\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n如新增包不依赖 Eino，继续保持 [pkg/render](pkg/render) 与 [pkg/render/html](pkg/render/html) 零 &#96;cloudwego/eino&#96; 依赖的约束。\n\n## 二期：UIModel-first 扩展\n\n当前 [pkg/render/uimodel/types.go](pkg/render/uimodel/types.go) 的 &#96;UIModel&#96; 只表达 Block 派生的 &#96;cards&#96;， [pkg/render/uimodel/build.go](pkg/render/uimodel/build.go) 也只处理 &#96;markdown&#96;、&#96;thinking&#96;、&#96;code&#96; 三种 block。二期可以新增更通用的业务 UIModel schema，例如 &#96;card&#96;、&#96;list&#96;、&#96;table&#96;、&#96;grid&#96;、&#96;meta&#96;，让 Go 服务输出结构化 JSON，再由 React/Vue 渲染器消费。\n\n二期建议拆成独立提案，不与一期模板渲染混在一个 PR 中：\n\n- 定义 &#96;BusinessUIModel&#96; 或升级现有 &#96;UIModel&#96; 的 schema 版本。\n- 提供 JSON schema / 示例 fixture，保障跨端契约稳定。\n- 提供 React/Vue 参考渲染器或最小 demo。\n- 保留 &#96;HybridPayload&#96; 的 &#96;blocks&#96; 回退策略，避免前端一次性迁移。\n\n## 迁移与回退\n\n业务项目接入时先保留本地模板渲染开关。灰度阶段按配置选择本地实现或 DigEino &#96;RenderTemplateFromFile&#96;；输出结果通过 golden HTML 或快照对比，确认策略师卡片 &#96;strategist_html&#96; 与现有输出一致后，再删除项目内重复模板加载和缓存代码。\n\n回退路径保持简单：业务配置切回本地渲染实现，不影响 DigEino 现有 Block HTML 与 UIModel 输出。",
  "todos": [
    {
      "content": "新增 pkg/render/template 包，实现 RenderTemplate、RenderTemplateFromFile、TemplateRenderOptions 与 TemplateError。",
      "id": "add-template-package",
      "status": "pending"
    },
    {

    },

    }
  ]
}
```

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Planning template implementation**

I need to create a directory and file while applying a patch. The design should be careful, using a package path and a name like "rendertemplate." I’ll have files named template.go and template_test.go, importing html/template with an alias.

I need to define options like Funcs map and other configuration aspects. I should validate function names and make sure they follow a simple pattern. It's essential to avoid panicking when registering functions, so ensuring valid signatures is key.
**Discussing caching strategy**

I’m considering how to implement caching effectively. For the cache key, I might use a struct that includes a string fingerprint. I need to think about essential elements like file cache keys based on modification time, size, and function keys since functions impact the behavior of the parsed template. 

If function names stay the same but their implementations change, the cached version could lead to incorrect results, so including function identities seems necessary. I’m considering caching only when Functions are empty, while also integrating function injection. I'll aim for a robust solution that distinguishes between different function versions.
**Considering explicit cache keys**

The plan suggests using an explicit cache key, which could include a hash of the template text to prevent surprises with stale caches. An explicit cache key also allows for version tracking. However, making "CacheKey explicit" optional is something to consider. If I include the text hash in the key and the template changes, it wouldn’t cache under the same key anymore, which could be both beneficial and complicating. I need to weigh the benefits carefully!</details></think>

```bash
git diff -- "pkg/render/template/template.go" "pkg/render/template/template_test.go" "pkg/render/README.md" "docs/ideas/2026-04-25-digeino模板渲染层上提执行方案.md"
```

```
diff --git a/pkg/render/README.md b/pkg/render/README.md
index 2c3a9db..1d486fe 100644
--- a/pkg/render/README.md
+++ b/pkg/render/README.md
@@ -10,6 +10,7 @@
 | &#96;github.com/originaleric/digeino/pkg/render/html&#96; | &#96;BlocksToHTMLWithConfig&#96;、&#96;WrapDocumentWithConfig&#96;（呈现由 &#96;config.yaml&#96; 的 &#96;render:&#96; 或代码传入） |
 | &#96;github.com/originaleric/digeino/pkg/render/eino&#96; | &#96;rendereino&#96;：&#96;schema.Message&#96; → 文本 → &#96;Parse&#96; |
 | &#96;github.com/originaleric/digeino/pkg/render/uimodel&#96; | **路线 C**：&#96;[]Block&#96; → &#96;UIModel&#96; / &#96;HybridPayload&#96;（与 &#96;blocks&#96; 并存，供 React 卡片等消费）；映射 YAML 见 &#96;uimodel/config/uimodel.example.yaml&#96; |
+| &#96;github.com/originaleric/digeino/pkg/render/template&#96; | &#96;rendertemplate&#96;：业务 view model → 安全 HTML 片段（基于 &#96;html/template&#96;，与 &#96;[]Block&#96; 渲染并行） |
 
 ## 如何使用
 
@@ -132,6 +133,39 @@ full := renderhtml.WrapDocumentWithConfig("标题", body, &amp;rc.Render)
 
 **说明**：&#96;BlocksToHTML&#96; 只产出 **HTML 片段**（无 &#96;&lt;html&gt;&#96;/&#96;&lt;body&gt;&#96;）。&#96;WrapDocument&#96; 才生成整页，并把片段包在 &#96;&lt;div class="llm-render-doc"&gt;&#96; 里；&#96;document.inline_css&#96; 里的版式请优先写 &#96;.llm-render-doc&#96; 与块 class（&#96;.llm-thinking&#96;、&#96;.llm-code&#96;），不要依赖 &#96;body&#96;，以免和「仅片段」用法混淆。
 
+### 3a. 数据模板渲染（view model → HTML 片段）
+
+当业务已经组织好 view model，并希望用项目内模板生成卡片 HTML 时，使用 &#96;pkg/render/template&#96;。它不参与 &#96;Parse -&gt; []Block -&gt; HTML&#96; 管线，也不读取 &#96;render:&#96; YAML；&#96;render:&#96; 仍只控制助手文本块的 HTML 呈现。
+
+&#96;&#96;&#96;go
+import rendertemplate "github.com/originaleric/digeino/pkg/render/template"
+
+html, err := rendertemplate.RenderTemplateFromFile(
+    "strategist_card.tmpl",
+    viewModel,
+    rendertemplate.TemplateRenderOptions{
+        BaseDir: "config/templates",
+        Cache:   true,
+        Strict:  true,
+        Funcs: map[string]any{
+            "percent": formatPercent,
+        },
+    },
+)
+if err != nil {
+    return err
+}
+&#96;&#96;&#96;
+
+安全默认：
+
+- 使用 Go 标准库 &#96;html/template&#96;，动态文本默认 HTML 转义。
+- &#96;BaseDir&#96; 会限制相对模板路径，拒绝 &#96;../&#96; 逃逸。
+- &#96;Strict&#96; 会把缺字段渲染成可捕获的执行错误。
+- &#96;Cache&#96; 会缓存已编译模板；文件模板按绝对路径、mtime、size、函数集与 strict 设置生成缓存键。
+
+错误可通过 &#96;errors.As(err, *rendertemplate.TemplateError)&#96; 区分 &#96;not_found&#96;、&#96;path&#96;、&#96;parse&#96;、&#96;execute&#96;、&#96;func&#96;，便于业务侧降级或回退本地渲染。
+
 ### 3b. 路线 C：块 → 卡片 JSON（&#96;uimodel&#96;）
 
 在已有 &#96;[]render.Block&#96; 上生成 **可选** &#96;ui_model&#96;，与 &#96;blocks&#96; 一并下发（HTTP JSON 或 SSE &#96;done&#96; 事件均可）。**&#96;mapping_version&#96; / &#96;mapping_hash&#96; / &#96;mapping_source&#96;** 便于前端按版本兼容；**&#96;mapping_changed_at&#96;** 可选（RFC3339）。

```

```
diff --git a/pkg/render/README.md b/pkg/render/README.md
index 2c3a9db..bd58c40 100644
--- a/pkg/render/README.md
+++ b/pkg/render/README.md
@@ -5,11 +5,12 @@
 ## 子包
 
 | 路径 | 作用 |
-|------|------|
+| ------ | ------ |
 | &#96;github.com/originaleric/digeino/pkg/render&#96; | 核心：&#96;Parse&#96;、&#96;ParseStablePrefix&#96;、类型 — **不** &#96;import cloudwego/eino&#96; |
 | &#96;github.com/originaleric/digeino/pkg/render/html&#96; | &#96;BlocksToHTMLWithConfig&#96;、&#96;WrapDocumentWithConfig&#96;（呈现由 &#96;config.yaml&#96; 的 &#96;render:&#96; 或代码传入） |
 | &#96;github.com/originaleric/digeino/pkg/render/eino&#96; | &#96;rendereino&#96;：&#96;schema.Message&#96; → 文本 → &#96;Parse&#96; |
 | &#96;github.com/originaleric/digeino/pkg/render/uimodel&#96; | **路线 C**：&#96;[]Block&#96; → &#96;UIModel&#96; / &#96;HybridPayload&#96;（与 &#96;blocks&#96; 并存，供 React 卡片等消费）；映射 YAML 见 &#96;uimodel/config/uimodel.example.yaml&#96; |
+| &#96;github.com/originaleric/digeino/pkg/render/template&#96; | &#96;rendertemplate&#96;：业务 view model → 安全 HTML 片段（基于 &#96;html/template&#96;，与 &#96;[]Block&#96; 渲染并行） |
 
 ## 如何使用
 
@@ -34,7 +35,7 @@ full := renderhtml.WrapDocumentWithConfig("标题", body, &amp;rc.Render)
 &#96;thinking_tag_pairs&#96; 行为：
 
 | YAML 中 &#96;thinking_tag_pairs&#96; | 效果 |
-|------------------------------|------|
+| ------------------------------ | ------ |
 | 省略或 &#96;null&#96; | 等价零值 &#96;Options{}&#96;，&#96;Parse&#96; 时 withDefaults 使用**嵌入**列表 |
 | &#96;[]&#96; 空列表 | **关闭**思考区识别 |
 
@@ -45,7 +46,7 @@ full := renderhtml.WrapDocumentWithConfig("标题", body, &amp;rc.Render)
 **&#96;parse:&#96;（可选，块识别）**：把「怎么认出 code / thinking」收拢到同一段；根级 &#96;thinking_tag_pairs&#96; 仍可单独使用。
 
 | 键 | 含义 |
-|----|------|
+| ---- | ------ |
 | &#96;parse.thinking_tag_pairs&#96; | 若 YAML 里**写出**该键（含 &#96;[]&#96;），则**整表覆盖**根级 &#96;thinking_tag_pairs&#96;；省略则沿用根级 |
 | &#96;parse.code_fence.open&#96; / &#96;close&#96; | 与 &#96;thinking_tag_pairs&#96; 相同键名：起始行 / 闭合行前缀；省略 &#96;close&#96; 时默认等于 &#96;open&#96;。旧键 &#96;opening&#96; 仍可读作 &#96;open&#96; |
 
@@ -54,7 +55,7 @@ full := renderhtml.WrapDocumentWithConfig("标题", body, &amp;rc.Render)
 **&#96;render:&#96; 小节键约定**：在默认 **&#96;parse_render&#96;** 下，小节名为 &#96;thinking&#96; / &#96;code&#96; / &#96;markdown&#96;（及固定的 &#96;document&#96;）。&#96;thinking&#96; 与 &#96;code&#96; 使用同一形状——&#96;outer&#96;、&#96;inner&#96;，每项为 &#96;tag&#96; + &#96;class&#96;。&#96;markdown&#96; 主要为 &#96;sanitize&#96;（goldmark 之后的 HTML 消毒）。兼容旧 YAML：&#96;thinking&#96; 的 &#96;wrapper_*&#96; / &#96;content_*&#96;、&#96;code&#96; 的 &#96;pre_class&#96; 等会在加载时迁到 &#96;outer&#96;/&#96;inner&#96;；&#96;sanitize_policy&#96; 可读作 &#96;sanitize&#96;。
 
 | 段 | 键 | 含义 |
-|----|-----|------|
+| ---- | ----- | ------ |
 | &#96;thinking&#96; | &#96;outer&#96; | 思考块最外层容器（如 &#96;aside&#96; + &#96;llm-thinking&#96;） |
 | &#96;thinking&#96; | &#96;inner&#96; | 内层包转义后的正文（如 &#96;pre&#96; + &#96;llm-thinking-pre&#96;） |
 | &#96;code&#96; | &#96;outer&#96; | 代码块外层（通常为 &#96;pre&#96; + &#96;llm-code&#96;） |
@@ -132,6 +133,39 @@ full := renderhtml.WrapDocumentWithConfig("标题", body, &amp;rc.Render)
 
 **说明**：&#96;BlocksToHTML&#96; 只产出 **HTML 片段**（无 &#96;&lt;html&gt;&#96;/&#96;&lt;body&gt;&#96;）。&#96;WrapDocument&#96; 才生成整页，并把片段包在 &#96;&lt;div class="llm-render-doc"&gt;&#96; 里；&#96;document.inline_css&#96; 里的版式请优先写 &#96;.llm-render-doc&#96; 与块 class（&#96;.llm-thinking&#96;、&#96;.llm-code&#96;），不要依赖 &#96;body&#96;，以免和「仅片段」用法混淆。
 
+### 3a. 数据模板渲染（view model → HTML 片段）
+
+当业务已经组织好 view model，并希望用项目内模板生成卡片 HTML 时，使用 &#96;pkg/render/template&#96;。它不参与 &#96;Parse -&gt; []Block -&gt; HTML&#96; 管线，也不读取 &#96;render:&#96; YAML；&#96;render:&#96; 仍只控制助手文本块的 HTML 呈现。
+
+&#96;&#96;&#96;go
+import rendertemplate "github.com/originaleric/digeino/pkg/render/template"
+
+html, err := rendertemplate.RenderTemplateFromFile(
+    "strategist_card.tmpl",
+    viewModel,
+    rendertemplate.TemplateRenderOptions{
+        BaseDir: "config/templates",
+        Cache:   true,
+        Strict:  true,
+        Funcs: map[string]any{
+            "percent": formatPercent,
+        },
+    },
+)
+if err != nil {
+    return err
+}
+&#96;&#96;&#96;
+
+安全默认：
+
+- 使用 Go 标准库 &#96;html/template&#96;，动态文本默认 HTML 转义。
+- &#96;BaseDir&#96; 会限制相对模板路径，拒绝 &#96;../&#96; 逃逸。
+- &#96;Strict&#96; 会把缺字段渲染成可捕获的执行错误。
+- &#96;Cache&#96; 会缓存已编译模板；文件模板按绝对路径、mtime、size、函数集与 strict 设置生成缓存键。
+
+错误可通过 &#96;errors.As(err, &amp;te)&#96; 区分 &#96;not_found&#96;、&#96;path&#96;、&#96;parse&#96;、&#96;execute&#96;、&#96;func&#96;，其中 &#96;te&#96; 为 &#96;*rendertemplate.TemplateError&#96;，便于业务侧降级或回退本地渲染。
+
 ### 3b. 路线 C：块 → 卡片 JSON（&#96;uimodel&#96;）
 
 在已有 &#96;[]render.Block&#96; 上生成 **可选** &#96;ui_model&#96;，与 &#96;blocks&#96; 一并下发（HTTP JSON 或 SSE &#96;done&#96; 事件均可）。**&#96;mapping_version&#96; / &#96;mapping_hash&#96; / &#96;mapping_source&#96;** 便于前端按版本兼容；**&#96;mapping_changed_at&#96;** 可选（RFC3339）。
@@ -192,7 +226,7 @@ path, err := renderexport.SaveAssistantHTML(ctx, "chat_render/out.html", blocks,
 思考区标签建议用 **&#96;config/config.yaml&#96;（库内参考）或自有 &#96;config.yml&#96;** 维护（见上文「YAML 配置」），无需改 Go 代码即可增删厂商格式。
 
 | &#96;BlockKind&#96; | 含义 | 识别方式（当前实现） |
-|-------------|------|----------------------|
+| ------------- | ------ | ---------------------- |
 | &#96;markdown&#96; | 正文 Markdown | 与代码围栏、思考区错开后的普通文本段 |
 | &#96;thinking&#96; | 思考 / 推理 | 由 &#96;Options.ThinkingTagPairs&#96; 成对标签包住的内容（默认含 &#96;&lt;think&gt;&#96;、&#96;&lt;reasoning&gt;&#96; 等，见 &#96;DefaultThinkingTagPairs&#96;） |
 | &#96;code&#96; | 代码 | CommonMark 式围栏：起始行以 &#96;Options.CodeFence.Open&#96; 为前缀，闭合行以 &#96;Close&#96; 为前缀（默认与 &#96;Open&#96; 相同）；首行前缀后可带语言标识 |
diff --git a/pkg/render/template/template.go b/pkg/render/template/template.go
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..0db454b
--- /dev/null
+++ b/pkg/render/template/template.go
@@ -0,0 +1,309 @@
+// Package rendertemplate renders business view models into safe HTML fragments.
+package rendertemplate
+
+import (
+	"bytes"
+	"crypto/sha256"
+	"encoding/hex"
+	"errors"
+	"fmt"
+	htmltemplate "html/template"
+	"os"
+	"path/filepath"
+	"reflect"
+	"regexp"
+	"sort"
+	"strings"
+	"sync"
+)
+
+// TemplateRenderOptions controls template parsing, execution, and caching.
+type TemplateRenderOptions struct {
+	// Funcs registers safe template helper functions.
+	Funcs map[string]any
+	// Cache enables compiled template caching. File templates are keyed by path
+	// and file metadata; inline templates require CacheKey to opt in.
+	Cache bool
+	// CacheKey explicitly names an inline or virtual template cache entry.
+	CacheKey string
+	// BaseDir constrains relative file template paths to a trusted root.
+	BaseDir string
+	// Strict makes missing map keys or struct fields return execution errors.
+	Strict bool
+}
+
+// TemplateErrorKind classifies template rendering failures for callers.
+type TemplateErrorKind string
+
+const (
+	TemplateErrorNotFound TemplateErrorKind = "not_found"
+	TemplateErrorPath     TemplateErrorKind = "path"
+	TemplateErrorParse    TemplateErrorKind = "parse"
+	TemplateErrorExecute  TemplateErrorKind = "execute"
+	TemplateErrorFunc     TemplateErrorKind = "func"
+)
+
+// TemplateError wraps a rendering failure with a stable kind and context.
+type TemplateError struct {
+	Kind         TemplateErrorKind
+	TemplateName string
+	Path         string
+	Err          error
+}
+
+func (e *TemplateError) Error() string {
+	if e == nil {
+		return ""
+	}
+	var b strings.Builder
+	b.WriteString("render template")
+	if e.Kind != "" {
+		b.WriteString(" ")
+		b.WriteString(string(e.Kind))
+	}
+	if e.TemplateName != "" {
+		b.WriteString(" ")
+		b.WriteString(e.TemplateName)
+	}
+	if e.Path != "" {
+		b.WriteString(" ")
+		b.WriteString(e.Path)
+	}
+	if e.Err != nil {
+		b.WriteString(": ")
+		b.WriteString(e.Err.Error())
+	}
+	return b.String()
+}
+
+func (e *TemplateError) Unwrap() error {
+	if e == nil {
+		return nil
+	}
+	return e.Err
+}
+
+type cachedTemplate struct {
+	t *htmltemplate.Template
+}
+
+var templateCache sync.Map
+
+var templateFuncNameRE = regexp.MustCompile(&#96;^[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*$&#96;)
+
+// RenderTemplate renders templateText with data using html/template escaping.
+func RenderTemplate(templateText string, data any, opts TemplateRenderOptions) (string, error) {
+	funcKey, err := validateFuncs(opts.Funcs)
+	if err != nil {
+		return "", newTemplateError(TemplateErrorFunc, inlineTemplateName(opts), "", err)
+	}
+	name := inlineTemplateName(opts)
+	key := ""
+	if opts.Cache &amp;&amp; strings.TrimSpace(opts.CacheKey) != "" {
+		key = cacheKey("inline", opts.CacheKey, hashString(templateText), strictKey(opts.Strict), funcKey)
+	}
+	t, err := templateFromCacheOrParse(key, name, templateText, opts)
+	if err != nil {
+		return "", err
+	}
+	return executeTemplate(t, name, "", data)
+}
+
+// RenderTemplateFromFile renders a template file with data using html/template escaping.
+func RenderTemplateFromFile(path string, data any, opts TemplateRenderOptions) (string, error) {
+	funcKey, err := validateFuncs(opts.Funcs)
+	if err != nil {
+		return "", newTemplateError(TemplateErrorFunc, filepath.Base(path), path, err)
+	}
+	absPath, err := resolveTemplatePath(path, opts.BaseDir)
+	if err != nil {
+		return "", err
+	}
+	info, err := os.Stat(absPath)
+	if err != nil {
+		kind := TemplateErrorPath
+		if errors.Is(err, os.ErrNotExist) {
+			kind = TemplateErrorNotFound
+		}
+		return "", newTemplateError(kind, filepath.Base(absPath), absPath, err)
+	}
+	if info.IsDir() {
+		return "", newTemplateError(TemplateErrorPath, filepath.Base(absPath), absPath, fmt.Errorf("template path is a directory"))
+	}
+	b, err := os.ReadFile(absPath)
+	if err != nil {
+		kind := TemplateErrorPath
+		if errors.Is(err, os.ErrNotExist) {
+			kind = TemplateErrorNotFound
+		}
+		return "", newTemplateError(kind, filepath.Base(absPath), absPath, err)
+	}
+	name := filepath.Base(absPath)
+	key := ""
+	if opts.Cache {
+		key = cacheKey("file", absPath, fmt.Sprintf("%d", info.ModTime().UnixNano()), fmt.Sprintf("%d", info.Size()), strictKey(opts.Strict), funcKey)
+	}
+	t, err := templateFromCacheOrParse(key, name, string(b), opts)
+	if err != nil {
+		if te, ok := err.(*TemplateError); ok {
+			te.Path = absPath
+			return "", te
+		}
+		return "", err
+	}
+	return executeTemplate(t, name, absPath, data)
+}
+
+func templateFromCacheOrParse(key, name, text string, opts TemplateRenderOptions) (*htmltemplate.Template, error) {
+	if key != "" {
+		if v, ok := templateCache.Load(key); ok {
+			return v.(cachedTemplate).t, nil
+		}
+	}
+	t, err := parseTemplate(name, text, opts)
+	if err != nil {
+		return nil, err
+	}
+	if key != "" {
+		v, _ := templateCache.LoadOrStore(key, cachedTemplate{t: t})
+		return v.(cachedTemplate).t, nil
+	}
+	return t, nil
+}
+
+func parseTemplate(name, text string, opts TemplateRenderOptions) (*htmltemplate.Template, error) {
+	t := htmltemplate.New(name)
+	if opts.Strict {
+		t = t.Option("missingkey=error")
+	}
+	if len(opts.Funcs) &gt; 0 {
+		var err error
+		t, err = withFuncs(t, opts.Funcs)
+		if err != nil {
+			return nil, newTemplateError(TemplateErrorFunc, name, "", err)
+		}
+	}
+	parsed, err := t.Parse(text)
+	if err != nil {
+		return nil, newTemplateError(TemplateErrorParse, name, "", err)
+	}
+	return parsed, nil
+}
+
+func executeTemplate(t *htmltemplate.Template, name, path string, data any) (string, error) {
+	var buf bytes.Buffer
+	if err := t.Execute(&amp;buf, data); err != nil {
+		return "", newTemplateError(TemplateErrorExecute, name, path, err)
+	}
+	return buf.String(), nil
+}
+
+func resolveTemplatePath(path, baseDir string) (string, error) {
+	path = strings.TrimSpace(path)
+	if path == "" {
+		return "", newTemplateError(TemplateErrorPath, "", "", fmt.Errorf("template path is empty"))
+	}
+	if baseDir == "" {
+		abs, err := filepath.Abs(path)
+		if err != nil {
+			return "", newTemplateError(TemplateErrorPath, filepath.Base(path), path, err)
+		}
+		return filepath.Clean(abs), nil
+	}
+	baseAbs, err := filepath.Abs(baseDir)
+	if err != nil {
+		return "", newTemplateError(TemplateErrorPath, filepath.Base(path), path, err)
+	}
+	baseAbs = filepath.Clean(baseAbs)
+	if resolvedBase, err := filepath.EvalSymlinks(baseAbs); err == nil {
+		baseAbs = filepath.Clean(resolvedBase)
+	}
+	candidate := path
+	if !filepath.IsAbs(candidate) {
+		candidate = filepath.Join(baseAbs, candidate)
+	}
+	abs, err := filepath.Abs(candidate)
+	if err != nil {
+		return "", newTemplateError(TemplateErrorPath, filepath.Base(path), path, err)
+	}
+	abs = filepath.Clean(abs)
+	if resolvedAbs, err := filepath.EvalSymlinks(abs); err == nil {
+		abs = filepath.Clean(resolvedAbs)
+	}
+	rel, err := filepath.Rel(baseAbs, abs)
+	if err != nil {
+		return "", newTemplateError(TemplateErrorPath, filepath.Base(path), abs, err)
+	}
+	if rel == "." || rel == "" {
+		return "", newTemplateError(TemplateErrorPath, filepath.Base(path), abs, fmt.Errorf("template path resolves to base directory"))
+	}
+	if strings.HasPrefix(rel, ".."+string(filepath.Separator)) || rel == ".." || filepath.IsAbs(rel) {
+		return "", newTemplateError(TemplateErrorPath, filepath.Base(path), abs, fmt.Errorf("template path escapes base dir %q", baseAbs))
+	}
+	return abs, nil
+}
+
+func validateFuncs(funcs map[string]any) (string, error) {
+	if len(funcs) == 0 {
+		return "funcs:none", nil
+	}
+	names := make([]string, 0, len(funcs))
+	for name, fn := range funcs {
+		trimmed := strings.TrimSpace(name)
+		if trimmed == "" {
+			return "", fmt.Errorf("function name must be non-empty")
+		}
+		if name != trimmed {
+			return "", fmt.Errorf("function name %q must not contain surrounding whitespace", name)
+		}
+		if !templateFuncNameRE.MatchString(name) {
+			return "", fmt.Errorf("invalid function name %q", name)
+		}
+		if fn == nil {
+			return "", fmt.Errorf("function %q must be non-nil", name)
+		}
+		v := reflect.ValueOf(fn)
+		if v.Kind() != reflect.Func {
+			return "", fmt.Errorf("function %q must be a func", name)
+		}
+		names = append(names, fmt.Sprintf("%s:%x", name, v.Pointer()))
+	}
+	sort.Strings(names)
+	return strings.Join(names, ","), nil
+}
+
+func withFuncs(t *htmltemplate.Template, funcs map[string]any) (out *htmltemplate.Template, err error) {
+	defer func() {
+		if r := recover(); r != nil {
+			err = fmt.Errorf("invalid template funcs: %v", r)
+		}
+	}()
+	return t.Funcs(htmltemplate.FuncMap(funcs)), nil
+}
+
+func inlineTemplateName(opts TemplateRenderOptions) string {
+	if strings.TrimSpace(opts.CacheKey) != "" {
+		return strings.TrimSpace(opts.CacheKey)
+	}
+	return "inline"
+}
+
+func strictKey(strict bool) string {
+	if strict {
+		return "strict"
+	}
+	return "missingkey-default"
+}
+
+func cacheKey(parts ...string) string {
+	return strings.Join(parts, "\x00")
+}
+
+func hashString(s string) string {
+	sum := sha256.Sum256([]byte(s))
+	return hex.EncodeToString(sum[:])
+}
+
+func newTemplateError(kind TemplateErrorKind, name, path string, err error) *TemplateError {
+	return &amp;TemplateError{Kind: kind, TemplateName: name, Path: path, Err: err}
+}
diff --git a/pkg/render/template/template_test.go b/pkg/render/template/template_test.go
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..35742a5
--- /dev/null
+++ b/pkg/render/template/template_test.go
@@ -0,0 +1,137 @@
+package rendertemplate
+
+import (
+	"errors"
+	"os"
+	"path/filepath"
+	"strings"
+	"testing"
+	"time"
+)
+
+func TestRenderTemplateEscapesHTML(t *testing.T) {
+	out, err := RenderTemplate(&#96;&lt;p&gt;{{.Name}}&lt;/p&gt;&#96;, map[string]any{"Name": &#96;&lt;script&gt;alert(1)&lt;/script&gt;&#96;}, TemplateRenderOptions{})
+	if err != nil {
+		t.Fatal(err)
+	}
+	if strings.Contains(out, "&lt;script&gt;") || !strings.Contains(out, "&amp;lt;script&amp;gt;alert(1)&amp;lt;/script&amp;gt;") {
+		t.Fatalf("expected escaped script, got %q", out)
+	}
+}
+
+func TestRenderTemplateStrictMissingKey(t *testing.T) {
+	_, err := RenderTemplate(&#96;{{.Missing}}&#96;, map[string]any{}, TemplateRenderOptions{Strict: true})
+	assertTemplateErrorKind(t, err, TemplateErrorExecute)
+}
+
+func TestRenderTemplateFuncs(t *testing.T) {
+	out, err := RenderTemplate(&#96;{{label .Risk}}&#96;, map[string]any{"Risk": "high"}, TemplateRenderOptions{
+		Funcs: map[string]any{
+			"label": func(s string) string {
+				return "risk-" + s
+			},
+		},
+	})
+	if err != nil {
+		t.Fatal(err)
+	}
+	if out != "risk-high" {
+		t.Fatalf("out=%q", out)
+	}
+}
+
+func TestRenderTemplateRejectsInvalidFunc(t *testing.T) {
+	_, err := RenderTemplate(&#96;{{bad .X}}&#96;, map[string]any{"X": "x"}, TemplateRenderOptions{
+		Funcs: map[string]any{"bad": "not-a-func"},
+	})
+	assertTemplateErrorKind(t, err, TemplateErrorFunc)
+}
+
+func TestRenderTemplateFromFileWithBaseDir(t *testing.T) {
+	dir := t.TempDir()
+	if err := os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(dir, "card.tmpl"), []byte(&#96;&lt;strong&gt;{{.Title}}&lt;/strong&gt;&#96;), 0644); err != nil {
+		t.Fatal(err)
+	}
+	out, err := RenderTemplateFromFile("card.tmpl", map[string]any{"Title": "Hello"}, TemplateRenderOptions{BaseDir: dir})
+	if err != nil {
+		t.Fatal(err)
+	}
+	if out != "&lt;strong&gt;Hello&lt;/strong&gt;" {
+		t.Fatalf("out=%q", out)
+	}
+}
+
+func TestRenderTemplateFromFileRejectsBaseDirEscape(t *testing.T) {
+	dir := t.TempDir()
+	outside := filepath.Join(t.TempDir(), "card.tmpl")
+	if err := os.WriteFile(outside, []byte(&#96;x&#96;), 0644); err != nil {
+		t.Fatal(err)
+	}
+	rel, err := filepath.Rel(dir, outside)
+	if err != nil {
+		t.Fatal(err)
+	}
+	_, err = RenderTemplateFromFile(rel, nil, TemplateRenderOptions{BaseDir: dir})
+	assertTemplateErrorKind(t, err, TemplateErrorPath)
+}
+
+func TestRenderTemplateFromFileNotFound(t *testing.T) {
+	_, err := RenderTemplateFromFile("missing.tmpl", nil, TemplateRenderOptions{BaseDir: t.TempDir()})
+	assertTemplateErrorKind(t, err, TemplateErrorNotFound)
+}
+
+func TestRenderTemplateFromFileCacheInvalidatesOnFileChange(t *testing.T) {
+	dir := t.TempDir()
+	p := filepath.Join(dir, "card.tmpl")
+	if err := os.WriteFile(p, []byte(&#96;one {{.Name}}&#96;), 0644); err != nil {
+		t.Fatal(err)
+	}
+	opts := TemplateRenderOptions{BaseDir: dir, Cache: true}
+	out, err := RenderTemplateFromFile("card.tmpl", map[string]any{"Name": "A"}, opts)
+	if err != nil {
+		t.Fatal(err)
+	}
+	if out != "one A" {
+		t.Fatalf("out=%q", out)
+	}
+	time.Sleep(2 * time.Millisecond)
+	if err := os.WriteFile(p, []byte(&#96;two {{.Name}}!&#96;), 0644); err != nil {
+		t.Fatal(err)
+	}
+	out, err = RenderTemplateFromFile("card.tmpl", map[string]any{"Name": "B"}, opts)
+	if err != nil {
+		t.Fatal(err)
+	}
+	if out != "two B!" {
+		t.Fatalf("expected cache invalidation, got %q", out)
+	}
+}
+
+func TestRenderTemplateInlineCacheUsesCacheKey(t *testing.T) {
+	opts := TemplateRenderOptions{Cache: true, CacheKey: "inline-card"}
+	out, err := RenderTemplate(&#96;{{.Name}}&#96;, map[string]any{"Name": "A"}, opts)
+	if err != nil {
+		t.Fatal(err)
+	}
+	if out != "A" {
+		t.Fatalf("out=%q", out)
+	}
+	out, err = RenderTemplate(&#96;{{.Name}}&#96;, map[string]any{"Name": "B"}, opts)
+	if err != nil {
+		t.Fatal(err)
+	}
+	if out != "B" {
+		t.Fatalf("out=%q", out)
+	}
+}
+
+func assertTemplateErrorKind(t *testing.T, err error, kind TemplateErrorKind) {
+	t.Helper()
+	var te *TemplateError
+	if !errors.As(err, &amp;te) {
+		t.Fatalf("expected TemplateError %q, got %T: %v", kind, err, err)
+	}
+	if te.Kind != kind {
+		t.Fatalf("kind=%q want %q err=%v", te.Kind, kind, err)
+	}
+}
```
